concerns.text: Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) requires Reference-Validator Agent verification for all citations, but no tasks implement this verification step. Plan.md explicitly states 'All external citations are verified via the Reference-Validator Agent' but tasks lack any Reference-Validator integration.

Constitution Principle III (Data Hygiene) requires Repository-Hygiene Agent PII scan before commits, but no tasks implement PII scanning. Spec FR-010 filtering requirements exist but PII scan task is absent.

Constitution Principle VI requires effect sizes reported 'alongside p-values for all primary comparisons'. T024 implements Cohen's d calculation but no task ensures paired output in same result block with p-values.

Constitution Principle VII requires stratification thresholds 'documented in code/' before analysis. T008 places thresholds in code/config/experiment.yaml but plan.md Constitution Check specifies 'code/analysis/experience.py' - path mismatch violates constitution.

Constitution Principle IV requires all figures/statistics trace to exactly one row in data/ and one code block. No tasks implement traceability verification or paper generation verification for SSoT compliance.
